test-suite.name: Unit Tests
test-suite.description: Internal code structure and logic tests

check.name: No circular dependencies
check.description: Verify the module dependency graph has no cycles

check.name: Layer separation
check.description: Verify UI, business logic, and data layers are separated

check.name: Interface contracts
check.description: Verify all interface contracts are satisfied

check.name: Entry point isolation
check.description: Verify entry points don't expose internal modules

subsection.name: agents Unit Tests
subsection.description: Unit tests for the agents module

test.name: agents module exports
test.description: Verify agents module has valid exports

test.name: agents error handling
test.description: Verify agents handles errors gracefully

test.name: agents input validation
test.description: Verify agents validates all inputs

subsection.name: ai Unit Tests
subsection.description: Unit tests for the ai module

test.name: ai module exports
test.description: Verify ai module has valid exports

test.name: ai error handling
test.description: Verify ai handles errors gracefully

test.name: ai input validation
test.description: Verify ai validates all inputs

subsection.name: config Unit Tests
subsection.description: Unit tests for the config module

test.name: config module exports

test.name: config error handling
test.description: Verify config handles errors gracefully

test.name: config input validation
test.description: Verify config validates all inputs

test-suite.name: Integration Tests
test-suite.description: Cross-module integration and data flow tests

test.name: Module dependency graph
test.description: Verify no circular dependencies exist between modules

test.name: Cross-module type compatibility
test.description: Verify types are compatible across module boundaries

test.name: Event flow integrity
test.description: Verify event emitters and listeners are properly connected

test.name: State management consistency
test.description: Verify state transitions are valid and atomic

test.name: Pipeline phase handoff
test.description: Verify data flows correctly between pipeline phases

expected-results.result: All phase outputs are valid inputs for next phase

test-suite.name: Security Tests
test-suite.description: Internal security analysis and vulnerability tests

test.name: Input sanitization
test.description: Verify all user inputs are sanitized before processing

test.name: Secret management
test.description: Verify no hardcoded secrets in source code

test.name: Dependency vulnerabilities
test.description: Verify dependencies have no known vulnerabilities

expected-results.result: All deps are up to date

check.name: No circular dependencies
check.description: Verify the module dependency graph has no cycles

check.name: Layer separation
check.description: Verify UI, business logic, and data layers are separated

check.name: Interface contracts
check.description: Verify all interface contracts are satisfied

check.name: Entry point isolation
check.description: Verify entry points don't expose internal modules

test.name: Layered architecture compliance
test.description: Verify code follows layered architecture pattern

expected-results.result: Presentation only imports from business logic
Business logic only imports from data access

test.name: Module boundary enforcement
test.description: Verify modules respect their public API boundaries

steps.step: Check for internal symbol access from outside

test.name: Dependency inversion principle
test.description: Verify high-level modules don't depend on low-level modules

test-suite.name: Code Quality Tests
test-suite.description: Code quality, complexity, and coverage validation

test.name: TypeScript strict mode compliance
test.description: Verify code compiles with strict TypeScript settings

test.name: Code complexity limits
test.description: Verify functions don't exceed complexity thresholds

test.name: Test coverage thresholds
test.description: Verify test coverage meets minimum thresholds

test.name: Documentation coverage
test.description: Verify public APIs have JSDoc documentation
